series_metadata.series_description: Records include correspondence sent as notification to external customers regarding any decisions made by ODM concerning the customer''s threats against the agency or employee. May include notice of possible legal actions should violations of the notice occur.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office for three (3) years of no further activity then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
